modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live chat session and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in short fragmented statements and use a warm and approachable tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show moderate technical familiarity. There should be several noticeable typos and some repeated wording or phrases.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Hearing busy signal or unexpected message when dialing out.

full_description_text:  
User is trying to make a call.  
They hear a busy signal or a message like "All circuits are busy."  
This happens when dialing out on VoIP.  
It's really frustrating and needs to be looked at.
short_description: Hearing busy signal or unexpected message when dialing out.
